items.title: Review and listening
items.body:
Final practice for this workbook lesson. Listen, repeat, and review vocabulary.

Examples:
• Do you want to sell your bicycle?
• 21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
• St. Patrick
• St. Patrick brought Christianity
• to Ireland many years ago.

items.text: when they study the discovery of America.
Christopher Columbus was looking for a route
to India when he discovered America.
For this reason the native Americans are called Indians.

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: Do you want to sell your bicycle?

items.prompt: Review: put the sentence in order.
items.answer: 21- Do you buy ice cream every day? / candy / chocolate.
